positive: Minimalist, high-contrast illustration of woodland spirits and celestial elements. A stylized fox sits among bioluminescent root structures, illuminated by a crescent moon portal opening into a nebula. Geometric pattern fill in the background, drawing on Art Nouveau and Neo-traditional tattoo aesthetics. Clean silhouettes, deep indigo, teal, and burnt orange color palette. Perfect central composition, isolated on a clean background, highly detailed, vector illustration style, suitable for large-scale apparel printing.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, missing limbs, poorly drawn, noise, muddy color, cropped, disfigured
